task_updates.executor_notes: Refactored the loop to extract generic tool calls while preserving the legacy run-text fallback, and added a create_task execution path that maps task_type to reference behavior, resolves selected clip generation IDs for shot reuse/creation, and submits through the unified create-task edge function. ESLint passed on the touched agent files, and the required full edge-unit rerun completed with the same 11 pre-existing failures outside this loop change.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `extractToolCalls` now accepts structured tool calls for any tool name and still falls back to the older run-command text formats. The new `create_task` branch routes text/style/subject/scene requests through image_generation and image-to-video requests through travel_between_images by passing task_type/reference_mode/image_urls into `createGenerationTask`, while reusing an existing shared shot or creating a new shot from the selected media generation IDs when appropriate.
